title: Perpetual Stagnation
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:"Perpetually Stagnant"}} [[File:Image67.png|center|frameless|680px|link=]] {{Quote|Quit, don't quit, noodles, don't noodles — you are too concerned with what was and what will be. This a saying: yesterday is history tomorrow is a mystery but today is a gift, that is why it is called the present.|Master Oogway}} {{Class Undetermined}} The '''Perpetual Stagnation''' level is an anomalous level of the Backrooms. ==Description== ---- '''Perpetually Stagnant''' is a no-exit level characterized by an endless staircase with a structure similar to that of an old apartment building frozen in time. The staircase extends infinitely both upward and downward, leading to the conclusion that no edge will ever be found within this level. The [[M.E.G.|M.E.G.]] decided to name it as such, drawing inspiration from its own nature, as explorers trapped here consistently describe it as outdated, depressing, and immutable ==Anomalies== ---- |-|Anomaly 01= = '''Temporal Discontinuity''' =
'''Temporal Non-linearity'''
'''One of the most notable characteristics of this level is the complete absence of time. Here, temporal continuity is inapplicable to everything except the explorer, meaning the level remains in an eternal, unalterable state of suspension. As a result, the [[M.E.G.|M.E.G.]] advises distrusting any device that displays time, as temporal irregularities can be severely disorienting.''' {{collapse|num=Portul1|final=|initial=[[File:Clock--v3.png|center|thumb]]|body=
''...''

''Decades turn into centuries, centuries into millennia. Millions of years pass, yet nothing has changed, nothing is changing, and nothing ever will.'' }}
|-|Anomaly 02= = '''Cognitive Hazard''' =
'''Mental Danger'''
'''Recent explorations conducted by the [[M.E.G.|M.E.G.]] confirm the existence of a persuasive mental phenomenon that infiltrates the explorer’s mind and implants pessimistic thought patterns intended to inhibit the individual’s progress. This phenomenon manifests irregularly and has therefore been classified as an unconscious-frequency cognitohazard.''' {{collapse|num=Portul2|final=|initial=[[File:1768875641712.png|center|thumb]]|body=
''♫''

{{Quote|Those who were seen dancing were deemed mad by those who could not hear the music.|Friedrich Nietzsche}} }}
==Entities== ---- No entity has been found at this level. ==Colonies and Outposts== ---- '''Perpetual Stagnation''' is incompatible with human settlements, as this level is affected by [[Phenomenon 15|Phenomenon 15.]] ==Entrances and Exits== ---- ==Entrances== As most entry points to the '''Perpetual Stagnation''' level are highly improbable and inaccessible, the [[M.E.G.|M.E.G]]. chooses not to disclose them in order to prevent explorers from becoming eternally trapped within the level, with no means of locating an exit. ==Exits== No confirmed exits from this level currently exist. {{collapse|num=back1|final=|initial= Is that all…?|body=
